title: 卢克·利特勒（ Luke Littler ）申请商标以打击人工智能假货
originalTitle: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
summary: 这位飞镖明星的形象已被合法地用于飞镖商品、零食和时尚品牌。
originalSummary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

title: 出版商因人工智能索赔而取消恐怖小说的发行
originalTitle: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
summary: 作家米娅·巴拉德（ Mia Ballard ）否认自己在写恐怖故事《害羞的女孩》（ Shy Girl ）
originalSummary: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

title: 研究表明，虚假的在线帖子加油自我诊断
originalTitle: False online posts fuel self-diagnosis, says study
summary: 诺福克和萨福克的研究人员表示，关于自闭症和多动症的虚假信息最令人担忧。
originalSummary: Norfolk and Suffolk researchers say the false information about autism and ADHD is most worrying.
